description: Use this API to change the value of a character ICON (i.e., an element of the CHRICN array) of the miscellaneous “other” type model with the specified model instance. The corresponding integer ICON is set to 0. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_cctmscomod_chricn(model, mins, j, chdata)

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change (j is relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model, e,g., 1 for first icon(m), 2 for icon(m+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: no CCT table entry for the model aaa with model instance xxx.
model names do not match - model is aaa not xxx.
no ICONs used in the model.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
